title: Amtech T1140 4 Digit Combination Padlock Black
features: DURABLE: This corrosion resistant combination padlock has a 6mm hardened steel shackle and a secure 4 digit combination lock
VERSATILE: It is ideal for securing luggage, suitcases, sports bags, rucksacks, lockers, cupboards, tool boxes, etc
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Padlock See more
